title: Priests of Ninn
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Otheruses|Priest|more=Ninn (disambiguation)}}
The '''Priests of Ninn''' were a religious order from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ninn]]. The Priests dressed in [[Color/Legends|green]] [[Clothing/Legends|vestments]] and practiced formalistic abstinence. They carried clay begging bowls as they spread throughout the [[Corporate Sector/Legends|Corporate Sector]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Han Solo's Revenge]]'' {{1stm}}
